title: AUTOPOT
description: This is a fabric mod that allows you to use all desired potions just by clicking one single button
body:
_Autopot is a client-side Fabric utility mod that throws your configured splash potions with one key._

## Features
- One-key autopot (L by default)
- Up to 5 configurable potion slots
- Per-slot:
- enable/disable
- primary potion
- fallback mode (None, Specific, Same Effect Longest)
- fallback potion
- delay in ticks
- execution order
- Inventory-safe throw logic:
  -   if potion is not in hotbar, temporarily swaps it into selected slot
  -   throws potion
  -   restores original hotbar item
- Custom config UI with potion icon picker and search
- Supports long-duration fallback behavior (for example 8:00 before shorter variants)

## Requirements
- Minecraft 1.21.11
- Fabric Loader 0.18.4+
- Fabric API
- Cloth Config
- Mod Menu (recommended, used to open settings)

## Notes
- Client-side mod
- Does not add server-side dependencies
- Intended for QoL automation of potion usage in PvP and general gameplay
